message:
fix(install): add cache-control headers and force-dynamic

Ensure the /install redirect is never cached:
- Add export const dynamic = "force-dynamic" for Next.js
- Add Cache-Control, Pragma, Expires headers to prevent caching

This ensures users always get the latest install script.
